purpose: Python compares previous grouped-error fingerprints with current grouped-error fingerprints before the LLM decides.

evidence_contract.previous_grouped_errors: Usually omitted in compare-history mode to save tokens; use grouped_error_diff previous_changed_examples and counts instead.
evidence_contract.current_grouped_errors: Usually omitted in compare-history mode to save tokens; use grouped_error_diff current_changed_examples, counts, and current_tool_scope_by_project instead.

decision_rules: Treat grouped_error_diff as the strongest comparison evidence.
Use grouped_error_diff counts, changed examples, high-severity fingerprint lists, and current_tool_scope_by_project to inspect the comparable baseline shape behind the diff.

When grouped_error_diff.resolved_high_severity_fingerprint_count is nonzero, do not final_report from grouped_error_diff alone. Call the smallest additional deterministic tool for grouped_error_diff.resolved_high_severity_tool_scope_by_project before final_report, then mention the disappeared previous high-severity family and the current verification result. Do not expand to unaffected projects unless affected-scope evidence shows a reason.
Return final_report when grouped_error_diff and supporting JSON evidence are enough for the report scope.
Choose targeted call_tools or read_skills when grouped_error_diff shows unclear impact, high-severity changes, changed scope, or evidence quality warnings.
